message:
refactor(tests): migrate all 111 #[tokio::test] to asupersync compat runtime in runtime_compat.rs

Replace every #[tokio::test] annotation with #[test] + compat
RuntimeBuilder::current_thread().build().unwrap() + rt.block_on(async {...}).
This ensures the ASUPERSYNC_HANDLE thread-local is installed, which
task::spawn needs to function correctly.

- Convert 6 process tests from async tokio::process::Command to sync
  std::process::Command (these tests don't need async)
- Fix spawn_blocking_abort_cancels to use realistic timing (50ms sleep
  instead of 60s) since spawn_blocking threads can't be interrupted
- Note tokio::process::Command still re-exported (29 async call sites
  need broader migration)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
